title: 突發 費倫隊長Astori死咗 ............

replies.msg: Fiorentina captain Davide Astori died in the night for reasons not yet specified. The player was in a hotel in Udine with the team. The Udinese-Fiorentina match has been postponed.

BREAKING NEWS: Fiorentina captain and Italy international Davide Astori has been found dead in his room of the hotel where he was with Fiorentina ahead of game v Udinese. Death came while on sleep
